description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a tall, uniform hedge that forms a rectangular boundary. The structure features a central entrance pathway lined with several large, leafy trees, leading to a prominent front door. The roof appears flat and is punctuated by various skylights and utility structures, suggesting a modern design. The property includes a driveway and multiple outdoor spaces, with paved walkways and landscaped areas visible throughout. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing natural light to different rooms. The overall color palette is muted, dominated by whites and light grays, with green from the hedges and trees.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by tall hedges and landscaped with trees and paved walkways. The building features asymmetrical window placement and a central entrance path.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central pathway, and flanking trees leading up to the bungalow within a hedge boundary.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the hedge, the driveway, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, additional outdoor spaces, and the hedge enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the grouped trees and the side facade of the bungalow.
